turnover-scheduler.name: Turnover scheduler
turnover-scheduler.tagline: Spot the impossible checkout/checkin gap before the cleaner does.
turnover-scheduler.blurb: Spot tight changeovers across multiple properties before the cleaner does.

cleaner-dispatch.name: Cleaner dispatch generator
cleaner-dispatch.tagline: Per-property assignments + SMS templates the cleaner can read on her phone.
cleaner-dispatch.blurb: Per-property assignment table + SMS templates + downloadable PDF.

smart-lock-codes.name: Smart lock code rotator
smart-lock-codes.tagline: Deterministic rolling codes per booking — same input, same code, every time.
smart-lock-codes.blurb: Deterministic rolling codes per booking — reproducible, no lookup table.

linen-par.name: Linen par calculator
linen-par.tagline: How many sheet sets and towel sets per property to never run out.
linen-par.blurb: Sheet sets and towel sets per property by king/queen mix and turn rate.

restock-calculator.name: Restock alert calculator
restock-calculator.tagline: Booking volume × consumable burn rate = when to reorder.
restock-calculator.blurb: Per-month consumable burn from booking volume — when to reorder.

damage-cost-lookup.name: Damage cost lookup
damage-cost-lookup.tagline: What it actually costs to replace a mattress, repaint a wall, swap a TV.
damage-cost-lookup.blurb: Searchable replacement-cost table — mattresses, repaint, TVs, more.
damage-cost-lookup.primaryKeyword: cost to replace mattress in airbnb

maintenance-schedule.name: Maintenance schedule generator
maintenance-schedule.tagline: HVAC, smoke detectors, deep clean — the recurring tasks an STR forgets.
maintenance-schedule.blurb: Annual maintenance schedule + PDF + .ics calendar export.
